sections.paragraph: f., the noun of unity of the preceding, a ship, Pro 30:19 Jon 1:3, Jon 1:5pl. Gen 49:13 Jud. 5:17 אֳנִיֹּות סֹוחֵר “merchant ships,” Pro 31:14 אֳנִיֹּות תַּרְשִׁישׁ “ships of Tarshish,” Isa 23:1 used generally of large merchant ships (see תַּרְשִׁישׁ ), 2Ch 9:21 Psa 48:8 Isa 2:16 אַנְשֵׁי אֳנִיֹּות “sailors,” 1Ki 9:27.
